minimumRoadWidthApproachWidth.description: Minimum clear width required on the road for safe stopping of buses and pedestrian movement.

minimumLengthOfBusBay.description: Length required for bus halting, queueing, and safe merging back into traffic.

minimumWidthOfPassengerPlatform.description: Space required for passenger movement, shelter, queuing, and safety operations.s

regionalRoads.description: For financial transactions at transport nodes

primaryUrbanRoads.description: For financial transactions at transport nodes

sectorGreenBeltRoads.description: For financial transactions at transport nodes

localUrbanRoads.description: For financial transactions at transport nodes

primaryInternalRoads.description: Main circulation routes inside the terminal; handle major traffic flow.

secondaryInternalRoads.description: Distribution roads connecting primary roads to service plots, ancillary facilities, and internal buildings.

accessRoadsTowardsOpenAreasGreens.description: Roads leading to open spaces, parking areas, green belts, and buffer zones within the facility.

sizeDimensionsOfParkingBays.description: Parking bay design, turning radii, holding capacity, slope, etc. must follow URDPFI & IRC.

minimumDistanceBetweenRoadEdgeAndParking.description: Minimum separation needed from the main carriageway for safe entry/exit of parked vehicles.

distanceBetweenTwoParkingStopsBusTruckSt.description: Ensures safety and avoids traffic conflict between standing vehicles.

widthOfPassengerBoardingAlightingPlatfor.description: For safe boarding/alighting of passengers at platforms.
Minimum safety width for pedestrian movement.

widthOfLayByBusBay.description: Required for safe bus halting without obstructing through traffic.
